hero.title: Sports Correspondent
hero.tagline: The story between the whitles - across the NFL, NBA, NHL, and everything in between.

about.name: Logan Starkey
paragraphs: I was scrolling through my college catalog one day when I saw my school's sports journalism program. Less than a week later, I'd changed my major and decided to pursue my biggest passions: sports and writing.
Three years in, I've covered nine different sports and interviewed countless athletes, coaches, and administrators.
about.pullQuote: The scoreboard tells you what team won. My job is to tell you the who, how, and why of what made them win.

contact.sub: Open to staff, freelance, and stringer assignments — remote or on the road.

footer: © 2026 LOGAN STARKEY — BUILT FOR THE NEXT ASSIGNMENT
